description_long: A male adult figure is depicted wearing a quilted tunic with a belted waist and a cross-body strap, paired with knee-length trousers. He has a collared shirt with rolled sleeves underneath the tunic, and his head is adorned with a wide-brimmed hat featuring a decorative feather. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and mustache, and his facial expression is neutral. He is barefoot, with well-defined toes and feet, and his arms are extended horizontally to the sides. The overall appearance suggests a historical or rustic urban pedestrian, possibly from a European setting.
description: A barefoot adult male in a quilted tunic, collared shirt, and wide-brimmed feathered hat, with arms outstretched and a cross-body strap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, feathered hat, quilted tunic, cross-body strap, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, facial hair, and the layered clothing, with the arm extended forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tunic, the cross-body strap, and the feather on the hat, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, hat, and the tunic's side, with the arm extended forward.
attribute_clothing_type: quilted tunic with a belted waist, collared shirt with rolled sleeves, knee-length trousers, wide-brimmed hat with feather
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly groomed hair with facial hair
